repo_files.app/handlers.py:
from db import query
from auth import require_auth


def search(request):
    require_auth(request)
    q = request.args.get('q')
    sql = "SELECT * FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%" + q + "%'"
    rows = query(sql)
    return rows
